data.content: Running a web search to collect today's (2026-03-23) top AI headlines and sources so the reply is current and citable. Using report_intent alongside the search.

toolRequests.name: web_search

arguments.query: Provide the three most important AI news items for 2026-03-23. For each item, give a one-sentence summary and include 1-2 reliable source URLs. Return results in Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) and focus on major product launches, policy/regulation changes, or landmark research breakthroughs.

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Provide the three most important AI news items for 2026-03-23. For each item, give a one-sentence summary and include 1-2 reliable source URLs. Return results in Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) and focus on major product launches, policy/regulation changes, or landmark research breakthroughs.

data.reasoningText: I need to make sure multi_tool_use is set up correctly since it expects tool names in a specific format. I'm crafting a web_search query that asks, "What are the most important AI news today (2026-03-23)?" to get concise summaries along with sources. Before I call the tools, I’ll add a preToolPreamble to describe my next action, making sure it's succinct and follows the guidelines. I think “Searching news” works well!

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
{"type":"text","text":{"value":"以下是2026年3月23日三項最重要的AI新聞摘要，涵蓋重大產品發佈、政策/法規變動和研究突破，每則皆附上1-2個可靠網址：

1. OpenAI推出GPT-5.4，支援百萬Token上下文
OpenAI於2026年3月發表GPT-5.4模型，能處理超過一百萬Token的上下文，提升長篇敘事與知識處理能力，標誌生成式AI模型邁入超大規模語境新時代。【3:3†source】

    來源：https://www.buildfastwithai.com/blogs/ai-models-march-2026-releases

2. Nebius攜手Nvidia打造全球首個專為機器人及物理AI的雲端平台
雲端基礎建設公司Nebius與Nvidia合作，專為機器人與物理AI應用設計雲平台，解決跨GPU訓練、模擬測試與邊緣部署的技術挑戰，被業界視為推動智慧機器人落地的重要里程碑【3:1†source】。

    來源：https://www.humai.blog/ai-news-trends-march-2026-complete-monthly-digest/

3. Meta自研四款新AI晶片，減少對Nvidia依賴
Meta宣佈推出MTIA 300、400、450及500共四款自家AI晶片，將廣泛部署於2027年底前，有望自有化AI算力、降低營運成本，並強化平台上的生成式與推理型AI能力。【3:2†source】

    來源：https://www.crescendo.ai/news/latest-ai-news-and-updates

這些新聞分別代表了AI能力極限突破（OpenAI GPT-5.4）、產業落地重要基礎設施（Nebius+Nvidia雲端）與AI硬體自主戰略（Meta自研晶片），對未來AI研發趨勢與全球產業布局有重大影響。","annotations":[{"text":"【3:3†source】","start_index":175,"end_index":187,"url_citation":{"title":"12+ AI Models in March 2026: The Week That Changed AI","url":"https://www.buildfastwithai.com/blogs/ai-models-march-2026-releases"}},{"text":"【3:1†source】","start_index":390,"end_index":402,"url_citation":{"title":"AI News & Trends March 2026: Complete Monthly Digest","url":"https://www.humai.blog/ai-news-trends-march-2026-complete-monthly-digest/"}},{"text":"【3:2†source】","start_index":604,"end_index":616,"url_citation":{"title":"Latest AI News and AI Breakthroughs that Matter Most: 2026 | News","url":"https://www.crescendo.ai/news/latest-ai-news-and-updates"}}]},"bing_searches":[{"text":"Provide the three most important AI news items for 2026-03-23. For each item, give a one-sentence summary and include 1-2 reliable source URLs. Return results in Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) and focus on major product launches, policy/regulation changes, or landmark research breakthroughs.","url":"https://www.bing.com/search?q=Provide+the+three+most+important+AI+news+items+for+2026-03-23.+For+each+item%2C+give+a+one-sentence+summary+and+include+1-2+reliable+source+URLs.+Return+results+in+Traditional+Chinese+%28zh-TW%29+and+focus+on+major+product+launches%2C+policy%2Fregulation+changes%2C+or+landmark+research+breakthroughs."}],"annotations":null}

data.content:
完成：已擷取並整理今日（2026-03-23）三則重要 AI 新聞摘要，含一句話重點說明與來源連結。

交付物：
- 三則重點摘要（繁體中文）：
  1. OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4，支援超過百萬 Token 的長上下文處理，提升長文生成與知識整合能力。來源：https://www.buildfastwithai.com/blogs/ai-models-march-2026-releases  
  2. Nebius 與 Nvidia 合作推出專為機器人與物理 AI 的雲端平台，簡化跨 GPU 訓練與模擬部署流程，推動智慧機器人落地。來源：https://www.humai.blog/ai-news-trends-march-2026-complete-monthly-digest/  
  3. Meta 公布四款自研 AI 晶片（MTIA 300/400/450/500），計畫至 2027 年底大規模部署以減少對外部供應鏈依賴並強化推理能力。來源：https://www.crescendo.ai/news/latest-ai-news-and-updates

下一步（選填）：
- 需更完整報導或要把摘要貼回 Telegram/Issue，請指定格式（簡短條列、新聞稿或含要點提問）。
